recommendations.title: Wayne's World
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two amiably aimless metal-head friends, Wayne and Garth. From Wayne's basement, the pair broadcast a talk-show called "Wayne's World" on local public access television. The show comes to the attention of a sleazy network executive w

recommendations.title: No Exit
recommendations.overview: Stranded at a rest stop in the mountains during a blizzard, a recovering addict discovers a kidnapped child hidden in a car belonging to one of the people inside the building which sets her on a terrifying struggle to identify who among them is the k

recommendations.title: Highway
recommendations.overview: Right before her wedding, a young woman finds herself abducted and held for ransom. As the initial days pass, she begins to develop a strange bond with her kidnapper.

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: The X Files: I Want to Believe
recommendations.overview: Mulder and Scully are called back to duty by the FBI when a former priest claims to be receiving psychic visions pertaining to a kidnapped agent.

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Alice Creed
recommendations.overview: A rich man's daughter is held captive in an abandoned apartment by two former convicts who abducted her and hold her ransom in exchange for her father's money.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Mothers' Instinct
recommendations.overview: When a sudden tragedy uproots the lives of two women and their families, they begin to question the relationships they once held so dear.

recommendations.title: High and Low
recommendations.overview: A Yokohama shoe executive faces a wrenching choice when kidnappers mistakenly seize his chauffeur’s son but demand the ransom anyway.

recommendations.title: 3096 Days
recommendations.overview: A young Austrian girl is kidnapped and held in captivity for eight years. Based on the real-life case of Natascha Kampusch.
